notes: NEW export batch cases only. Push with local/scripts/push_export_testrail_cases.py — does not update fdc14091_testrail_map.json or existing TestRail case ids.
preconditions_template:
1. NextGen PP/QA is reachable; log in if not already signed in.
2. Prefer reuse of existing data on the page (no rebuild unless empty).
3. Capture response header correlation-id (not x-correlation-id) from GraphQL.
4. Follow plain-English steps; emit AUDIT_RESULT with real UUID after the export mutation.
5. Jira: FDC-14091.

cases.title: Verify exportFontAssets — Export (global)
cases.label: exportFontAssets(global)
cases.custom_preconds:
1. NextGen PP/QA is reachable; log in if not already signed in.
2. Prefer reuse of existing data on the page (no rebuild unless empty).
3. Capture response header correlation-id (not x-correlation-id) from GraphQL.
4. Follow plain-English steps; emit AUDIT_RESULT with real UUID after the export mutation.
5. Jira: FDC-14091.

custom_steps_separated.content: Go to Manage → Usage activity → Fonts tab.
custom_steps_separated.expected: Page loaded; Export data is visible when applicable.

custom_steps_separated.content: Open a font usage row and open the drawer → Assets tab.
custom_steps_separated.expected: Page loaded; Export data is visible when applicable.

custom_steps_separated.content: Click Export data.
custom_steps_separated.expected: Page loaded; Export data is visible when applicable.

custom_steps_separated.content: Network filter operationName=ExportFontAssets → copy response header correlation-id (NOT x-correlation-id) → emit AUDIT_RESULT.
custom_steps_separated.expected: GraphQL exportFontAssets fires; response has correlation-id; AUDIT_RESULT emitted with real UUID; raw+enrich visible in Generation Status.
